rules.name: AIGO – Employer Launch Plan
rules.description: When an Employer Launch issue is created, run the AI Employer Launch Agent and post the workback plan and readiness score. Does not launch.

value.prompt: Build an employer launch workback plan: readiness score, launch phases with tasks, blockers, required assets, QA checklist, and suggested subtasks. Go/no-go and claims approval are human steps.

value.body:
🤖 AI Growth Ops — Employer Launch Plan (analysis only)

{{agentResponse}}
